plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Fruit Hotel Staff to use your location for live delivery tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Fruit Hotel Staff to use your location for live delivery tracking.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to show your position on the delivery map and share live tracking.
